name: My Siri keeps missing what I say. What should I do first to fix Siri optimization?
description: Check Siri & Search settings, microphone permissions, and your iPhone update first. Use short, specific commands and retest after each change.

mainEntity.name: My Siri keeps missing what I say. What should I do first to fix Siri optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start with Siri and Search settings, then turn on the features you actually use: Listen for “Hey Siri,” Siri Suggestions, and any app permissions Siri needs. If Siri still feels inconsistent, check microphone access, update iOS, and test with short, specific commands.
acceptedAnswer.description: Check Siri & Search settings, microphone permissions, and your iPhone update first. Use short, specific commands and retest after each change.
